title: abc9 assertion failure: src/misc/tim/timMan.c:435: void Tim_ManCreate(Tim_Man_t *, void *, Vec_Flt_t *, Vec_Flt_t *): Assertion `pIfBox != NULL'
body:
Unfortunately this is a very large design, but as it's a assertion hopefully it's not too hard to track down (despite being a noflatten flow, building the problem module by itself doesn't seem to cause the error).

Run top.ys in the attached archive to reproduce: 
[abc9assert.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/4262911/abc9assert.zip)

Output:
```
7.50.28.4. Executing ABC9.
Running ABC command: <yosys-exe-dir>/yosys-abc -s -f <abc-temp-dir>/abc.script 2>&1
ABC: ABC command line: "source <abc-temp-dir>/abc.script".
ABC: 
ABC: + read_lut <yosys-exe-dir>/../share/yosys/xilinx/abc9_xc7.lut 
ABC: + read_box <abc-temp-dir>/input.box 
ABC: + &read <abc-temp-dir>/input.xaig 
ABC: yosys-abc: src/misc/tim/timMan.c:435: void Tim_ManCreate(Tim_Man_t *, void *, Vec_Flt_t *, Vec_Flt_t *): Assertion `pIfBox != NULL' failed.
sh: line 1: 374074 Aborted                 (core dumped) /usr/local/bin/yosys-abc -s -f /tmp/yosys-abc-VqVsHE/abc.script 2>&1
ERROR: ABC: execution of command "/usr/local/bin/yosys-abc -s -f /tmp/yosys-abc-VqVsHE/abc.script 2>&1" failed: return code 134.
```

The ABC output folder is 
[yosys-abc-VqVsHE.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/4262928/yosys-abc-VqVsHE.zip)
